title: Ethics, academic honesty to guide AI use in Napa Valley Unified schools, board says
description: Napa Valley Unified's policy lays out ten principles in accordance with which the district supports the use of artificial intelligence. This includes ethical use, equitable access and a focus on academic honesty.
content:
As educational institutions grapple with the entry of artificial intelligence into learning spaces, Napa Valley Unified will allow its use under a policy that emphasizes ethics, equity and academic honesty.

title: Promotion Day celebrated at Vivekanand Millennium School
description: ‘Samvardhanam 2026’ — The Promotion Day at St Vivekanand Millennium School, Pinjore, was a vibrant and heart-warming celebration that beautifully captured the spirit of students’ growth, efforts and achievements. Held at Dr BR Ambedkar Auditorium, the event transformed the traditional result day into a joyful and unforgettable experience where every child felt valued, motivated and truly celebrated. The programme began with a soulful rendition of Vande Mataram, followed by an energetic celebration that lit up the stage with rhythmic music and dazzling cold pyros, setting an enthusiastic tone for the day. As excitement built up, students eagerly waited to hear their names. The moment their names were announced with lively music, they walked onto the stage with great confidence. Their success was celebrated in a grand manner with sparkling effects and cheerful applause, making each child feel special and proud. The major highlights of the event were the beautifully arranged 360-degree selfie stand and other selfie corners where students and parents captured joyful moments together in their graceful convocation attire. These vibrant setups became the centre of attraction, preserving unforgettable memories of this milestone day. Bringing smiles all around, cartoon characters interacted with students, adding a playful and joyous vibe to the celebration. Adding a futuristic touch, the school recognised students’ participation in skill-based learning. Certifications in advanced domains such as Blockchain, Artificial Intelligence, Coding & Programming, and Cyber Security — awarded in collaboration with IBM and TransNeuron —reflected the school’s commitment to preparing students for the future. The Parent Appreciation Card Initiative added an emotional touch, as parents shared heartfelt messages of pride and encouragement, strengthening bonds and boosting students’ confidence. Parents also appreciated the school’s dedicated efforts in nurturing their children’s overall development. Students also expressed their gratitude towards their parents, teachers and school, reflecting happiness, confidence and a strong determination to move ahead. Principal Dr Piyush Punj emphasised that education goes beyond marks, focusing on building confident and responsible individuals.
content: ‘Samvardhanam 2026’ — The Promotion Day at St Vivekanand Millennium School, Pinjore, was a vibrant and heart-warming celebration that beautifully captured the spirit of students’ growth, efforts and achievements. Held at Dr BR Ambedkar Auditorium, th... [2046 chars]

title: Strategic Collaboration: South Korea and France's Innovation Pursuit
description: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung emphasized that ties with France should evolve from partnership to strategic collaboration, highlighting artificial intelligence and nuclear energy as crucial to innovation. French President Emmanuel Macron's two-day visit to South Korea underscores these themes of advancing bilateral alliances.
content: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung has called for deeper ties with France, advocating for a shift from mere partnership to strategic collaboration. Key areas of focus include artificial intelligence and nuclear energy, both considered essential for... [497 chars]

title: Fox News Poll: Broad anxiety about AI doesn’t extend to jobs
description: A new poll finds 66% of voters are concerned about artificial intelligence, up from 56% in 2023, even as most aren't worried about losing their own jobs.
content:
As artificial intelligence continues to expand into homes and the workplace, voters are less concerned about it taking their jobs and more worried about its overall influence.

description: Silicon Valley firms want to tap India’s solar power, but New Delhi must prioritise human welfare over artificial intelligence, says Andy Mukherjee for Bloomberg Opinion.
